login.accountNotSetUp: This account was created by an admin. Please use the Forgot Password link to set your password and activate sign-in.

devLogin.title: Demo sign-in (no backend)
devLogin.hint: The V2 surfaces (Member, Leader, G12) have no backend yet. Pick a role below to demo with a mock session. The form above still runs real Firebase auth for student / admin / super-admin accounts.

federated.comingSoonMessage: Federated sign-in is being wired up. Use email/password for now.

home.bsBody: Bible School courses require Student access. Submit a request — admins review it within 24 hours.
home.cgBody: See cells you belong to and weekly reports. Read-only — only your Leader can file new reports.
home.bannerTitle: You're at the starting line — be a Student.
home.bannerBody: Click Bible School in the sidebar to request Student access. Approval unlocks every course and the full Bible School workspace.

applyStudent.title: Request Student access
applyStudent.subtitle: Become a Student to unlock the full Bible School workspace — browse courses, request enrolments, and track your learning.
applyStudent.whatYouGet: What you'll get as a Student
applyStudent.noExtraFields: No extra fields — just confirm and submit. Once an admin approves, your Student workspace unlocks instantly.
applyStudent.browseBody: See every course with batches and semester dates.
applyStudent.requestBody: Pick an open intake — admins approve per course.
applyStudent.lessonsBody: Watch embedded videos and download attachments.
applyStudent.trackBody: See completion across every semester at a glance.
applyStudent.afterApprovalBody: You'll keep your Member status — the Student role is added on top. Sign in next, and you'll land on a full Student workspace with Dashboard, My Courses, Browse Courses and My Requests in the sidebar.
applyStudent.adminWillReview: An admin will review your request shortly.

pendingApproval.title: Waiting for approval
pendingApproval.body1: An administrator is reviewing your Student application. We'll email
pendingApproval.body2: the moment it's approved — usually within
pendingApproval.step3Sub: You'll be able to apply to a course intake

courseEditor.createSubtitle: Title → batches → semesters → subjects. Semester dates auto-clamp to the batch window so students never see content outside an intake.
courseEditor.titleHint: Must be unique. Changes take effect immediately.

courseEditor.batchesHint: Each batch is a separate intake window. Past batches auto-close so students only see future or open intakes when applying.
courseEditor.semestersHint: Start/end dates must fall inside the batch window. Closed semesters lock content automatically.
courseEditor.semesterDateError: Semester dates must be inside the batch intake window.
courseEditor.noLessons: No lessons yet — add one above.
courseEditor.youtubeHint: Lesson videos are embedded from YouTube only.
courseEditor.semesterScheduleHint: Each semester runs for a fixed window. Once End date passes, content locks for the cohort.
courseEditor.archiveInfo: This course is archived. Archived courses can only be deleted — the API does not support unarchiving. Enrolled students retain read-only access for 30 days.
courseEditor.descriptionHint: Saves as a draft. Add batches, semesters and lessons below — or come back later from Courses → Edit.

users.title: Users
users.promotionInfo: Promote a Member to Leader or G12 here — roles are additive, so members keep their existing access.
users.bannerBody: Members ask a pastor or G12 leader in person to become a Leader or G12. The admin then adds the role here — roles are additive (the user keeps Member & Student access).
users.enrollmentsInfo: All course requests this student has submitted.

manageRoles.intro: Roles are additive — adding Leader or G12 on top of a Student keeps every existing access intact. Member is required for every signed-in user.
manageRoles.roleMemberHelp: Every signed-in user has this — cannot be removed.
manageRoles.roleStudentHelp: Browse the Bible School catalogue and apply for course enrolments.
manageRoles.roleLeaderHelp: Lead a cell, file weekly reports, manage members.
manageRoles.roleG12Help: Oversee a network of leaders, promote new ones.
manageRoles.roleAdminHelp: Approve role requests, manage courses, view network analytics.

hero.body: TCCR brings Bible School learning and Cell Group fellowship into a single platform. Enrol in structured course batches, gather weekly with your cell, and let leaders track every meeting in seconds.

modules.subtitle: Bible School and Cell Groups share a single sign-in. Switch between them in one click — and language any time.

bs.title: Bible School
bs.body: Structured programmes with semester-by-semester learning. Multi-batch intakes, browser-based labs and lecture recordings on every lesson.

cg.title: Cell Groups
cg.body: Stay connected to your G12 leader, attend weekly cells, and let your leader file reports in seconds — on web or mobile.

how.title: How
how.subtitle: Three quick steps from sign-up to your first lesson — or your first cell meeting.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.body: Sign up in under a minute — you'll join as a Member straight away.

step2.title: Pick a course or join a cell
step2.body: Apply to enrol in a course batch, or wait to be added to your cell.

step3.title: Learn & connect
step3.body: Watch lessons, complete labs, attend cells, and grow with your community.

hierarchy.title: Course → Batch → Semester
hierarchy.body: Pick the intake that fits your schedule. Past intakes auto-close so you always join the right cohort.

semesters.title: Time-bound semesters
semesters.body: Each semester has a clear start and end date. Once a semester closes, content locks for that cohort.

access.title: Approved access
access.body: Admins verify each request — for Student role, course enrolment, or leader promotion — within 24 hours.

reports.title: Weekly cell reports
reports.body: Leaders and G12 leaders file a single, structured weekly report — attendance, subject, follow-ups in one form.

analytics.title: Live analytics
analytics.body: Leader, G12 and admin dashboards refresh weekly with attendance, growth and participation insights.

languages.title: සිංහල · தமிழ் · English
languages.body: Switch language any time. Notifications and emails arrive in your preferred language.

q1.q: Do I need to be a student to join a cell?
q1.a: No — every registered user is a Member by default and can be added to a cell group. Student role is only required to enrol in Bible School courses.

q2.q: How does a course intake work?
q2.a: Each course runs as multiple Batches. You apply to a specific Batch that fits your schedule. Past Batches auto-close, so you'll only see future or open intakes when applying.

q3.q: Who can file a cell report?
q3.a: Only the cell's Leader or G12 Leader. Members can view past reports of their own cell, but they cannot edit or file new ones.

q4.q: How do I become a Leader or G12?
q4.a: Existing G12 Leaders can promote a Member or Leader from their network. Admins and Super Admins can also assign these roles directly.

finalCta.subtitle: One account, both modules. Sign up takes under a minute.
